description: Frozen same-pool comparison of the validated ACSP core with geographic, environmental, dual-space, local-score, random, and held-out-oracle selectors.
candidate_pool_rule: Training-only potential_candidates after removal of occurrence-supported, known-location, and known-anchor candidates.
failure_rule: Missing or failed expected folds contribute zero recall in intention-to-evaluate pair means.
claim_guardrail: Comparator results must be reported even when ACSP is equivalent or inferior; the held-out oracle is non-operational headroom only.
